PPJA.cannabiskit_Orange_Sherbert.descrip: This short, bushy plant is ideal for full body relaxation with its high resin production and short flowering time.

PPJA.cannabiskit_Northern_Lights_Starter: A popular strain of cannabis indica which relieves pain and sleeplessness while being left mellow. Plant these in the summer. Takes 10 days to mature, afterwards it continues to produce every 3 days.

PPJA.cannabiskit_OG_Kush_Starter.descrip: A hybrid which carries an earthy pine and sour lemon scent with woody undertones and crushes stress. Plant these in the summer or fall. Takes 13 days to mature, afterwards it continues to produce every 3 days.

PPJA.cannabiskit_Sour_Diesel_Starter.des: This strain delivers energizing, dreamy cerebral effects. A top choice among medical patients. Plant these in the fall. Takes 12 days to mature, afterwards it continues to produce every 3 days.

PPJA.cannabiskit_Strawberry_Cough.descri: A combination of stimulating sativa and relaxing indica, hybrid strains are the best of both worlds.
A combination of stimulating sativa and relaxing indica, hybrid strains are the best of both worlds.
PPJA.cannabiskit_Strawberry_Cough_Starte: A potent sativa blend with skunky, berry flavours. Good for anxiety and restoring internal balance. Plant these in the spring or summer. Takes 14 days to mature, afterwards it continues to produce every 3 days.

PPJA.cannabiskit_White_Widow.description: A combination of stimulating sativa and relaxing indica, hybrid strains are the best of both worlds.

PPJA.cannabiskit_White_Widow_Starter.des: A balanced hybrid, it's buds are white with crystal resin warning you of the potent effects to come. Plant these in spring, or fall. Takes 15 days to mature, afterwards it continues to produce every 2 days.
